description: Simmons and May reunite after Simmons’ brush with Hydra and Andrew. Simmons informs May that Ward took Fitz through the portal and insists on going back for him, revealing Andrew’s ambiguous role in her escape. May is conflicted but prioritizes the mission to recover the team. The group regroups with the others barricaded inside the portal chamber.
location: English castle (site of the monolith / Distant Star Pathfinder facility)
